name: cultural_socialization_in_childhood
description: Captures the degree to which respondents were exposed to cultural practices and resources during childhood through parental and household influences, reflecting early cultural capital formation.

name: cultural_openness_and_national_identity
description: Measures respondents' orientations toward cultural diversity, foreign cultural influence, and the preservation of Mexican cultural heritage, reflecting tension between cosmopolitanism and cultural nationalism.

name: ethnocultural_identity_and_linguistic_capital
description: Assesses respondents' identification with indigenous or minority cultural heritage and their practical linguistic competencies in indigenous and foreign languages, capturing ethnic identity and multilingual capital.

name: reading_engagement_and_literacy_orientation
description: Measures the extent and ease of respondents' reading practices across different media types and their perceived purpose of reading, reflecting functional literacy and reading culture.

name: subjective_socioeconomic_status
description: Captures respondents' self-assessed position in the social and economic hierarchy, including perceived economic situation, self-identified social class, and overall life satisfaction, reflecting subjective stratification.
